subcategories.label: 2D flat
subcategories.hint: Bold outlines, flat color fills, readable silhouette; playful readable shapes.

subcategories.label: 3D cartoon
subcategories.hint: Rounded forms, soft shading, toy-like or Pixar-adjacent exaggeration without horror uncanny.

subcategories.label: Anime
subcategories.hint: Clean line art, cel-style shading, expressive eyes optional—keep respectful for deity depictions.

subcategories.label: Comic book
subcategories.hint: Ink outlines, halftone or flat fills, dynamic pose readability.

subcategories.label: Chibi
subcategories.hint: Large head, small body—use only if tone fits; keep recognizable deity cues.

subcategories.label: Cel-shaded 3D
subcategories.hint: Stepped shading bands on 3D forms; crisp graphic separation of light and shadow.

subcategories.label: Natural motivated light
subcategories.hint: Physically plausible sun/sky bounce; soft shadows; lens-neutral clarity.

subcategories.label: Film grain 35mm
subcategories.hint: Subtle photochemical grain, gentle halation; restrained grade—not noisy.

subcategories.label: Neo-noir contrast
subcategories.hint: Strong key/fill ratio, deep shadows, selective rim—avoid unreadable faces.

subcategories.label: Documentary observational
subcategories.hint: Neutral lensing, handheld micro-move optional; grounded realism.

subcategories.label: Epic widescreen
subcategories.hint: Ultra-wide composition, layered depth, scale cues in environment.

subcategories.label: Intimate shallow focus
subcategories.hint: Close coverage, shallow depth of field; emotional presence without clutter.

subcategories.label: Full CGI
subcategories.hint: Fully synthetic scene with consistent shaders; aim photoreal or stylized consistency.
subcategories.tooltip:
Fully synthetic scene with consistent shaders.
Lock photoreal or stylized consistency across materials.
Ideal when every surface and light must be art-directed.

subcategories.label: Particle-heavy FX
subcategories.hint: Dust, embers, magic particles—controlled density so figure stays readable.
subcategories.tooltip:
Layered particles: dust, embers, sparks, ritual motes.
Keep density controlled so the deity silhouette stays readable.
Pairs well with dramatic motion and divine presence.

subcategories.label: Photoreal compositing
subcategories.tagline: Live-action plate + CGI that matches grain.
subcategories.hint: Live-action plate integration with CGI—match grain, color, and shadow contact.
subcategories.tooltip:
Integrate CGI into a live-action plate.
Match grain, color science, and shadow contact.
Grounded realism with epic-scale embellishments.

subcategories.label: Elemental power FX
subcategories.hint: Focused elemental motifs (lightning, fire, storm, radiant bursts) with coherent scale and energy arcs.
subcategories.tooltip:
High-impact elemental motifs: lightning branches, fire crowns, storm sheets.
Keep scale coherent—energy arcs read clearly against the figure.
Epic spectacle without muddying silhouette or face.

subcategories.label: Cloth & hair simulation
subcategories.tagline: Flowing fabric and hair—dynamic secondary motion.
subcategories.hint: Dynamic cloth and hair simulation—stable collision cues, readable silhouette, controlled stray strands.
subcategories.tooltip:
Secondary motion from simulated cloth and hair.
Stable collision cues so motion feels physically grounded.
Readable silhouette; controlled stray strands for elegance.

subcategories.label: Fantasy elemental FX
subcategories.hint: Fire/water/light motifs with epic scale but coherent physics cues.
subcategories.tooltip:
Broad fantasy elemental language—fire, water, radiant light.
Epic scale with coherent physics cues.
Great for mythic vistas and symbolic motifs.

subcategories.label: Mocap hybrid
subcategories.hint: Performance-driven body motion with digital doubles or touch-up.
subcategories.tooltip:
Blend captured performance with digital doubles or cleanup.
Keeps human timing while allowing heroic proportions.
Use when grounded acting matters alongside FX.

subcategories.label: Stylized magical FX
subcategories.hint: Graphic glows, runes, aura—clear silhouette preservation.
subcategories.tooltip:
Graphic magical language: glows, runes, stylized aura.
Preserve clear silhouette and readable edges.
Ideal for iconic, poster-like divine imagery.

subcategories.label: Traditional 2D hand-drawn
subcategories.hint: Frame-by-frame drawn motion with slight line boil optional.

subcategories.label: Stop-motion
subcategories.hint: Miniature tactile surfaces, stepped motion, tangible lighting.

subcategories.label: Vector / Flash-style 2D
subcategories.hint: Clean fills and gradients; crisp motion tweens—avoid chaotic limbs.

subcategories.label: Feature 3D animation
subcategories.hint: Smooth interpolated 3D acting; expressive but controlled facial.

subcategories.label: Cut-out / silhouette
subcategories.hint: Layered paper or shadow-puppet feel; strong graphic shapes.

subcategories.label: Rotoscope trace
subcategories.hint: Traced live motion with illustrative overlay—dreamlike edge shimmer Optional.

subcategories.label: Oil painting
subcategories.hint: Visible brush texture, rich impasto hints; classical palette discipline.

subcategories.label: Watercolor
subcategories.hint: Soft washes, bloom edges, paper grain—gentle spiritual mood.

subcategories.label: Sketch / ink
subcategories.hint: Cross-hatch or brush ink lines; monochrome or limited palette.

subcategories.label: Concept art polish
subcategories.hint: Illustration-ready staging, mood-focused lighting studies.

subcategories.label: Matte painting vista
subcategories.hint: Epic landscape backdrop integration; painterly depth haze.

subcategories.label: Surrealist symbolic
subcategories.hint: Symbolic distortion where appropriate—still respect figure clarity.

subcategories.label: Classical mural
subcategories.hint: Stone/architectural mural palette; flattened perspective echoes temple art.

subcategories.label: Temple stone carving
subcategories.hint: Relief lighting, chisel readability, monumental calm.

subcategories.label: Indian miniature
subcategories.hint: Fine jewelry detail, jewel tones, flattened scenic composition.

subcategories.label: Pattachitra folk
subcategories.hint: Bold outlines, decorative flora borders optional—folk narrative clarity.

subcategories.label: Bronze idol sculptural
subcategories.hint: Metallic patina read, carved ornament hints, still gravitas.

subcategories.label: Epic fresco backdrop
subcategories.hint: Soft plaster texture, narrative fresco sweep behind figure.
